decision_commentary: TC-004 specific checks all PASS: commercial_health_center template applied; health_authority_compliance_clause present; cofepris_compliance_clause present (COFEPRIS as explicit named deliverable in every phase). 20-item checklist verified: (1) conceptual design phase with deliverables, (2) architectural design phase, (3) executive plans, (4) optional supervision clause, (5) landscape excluded, (6) structural engineering, (7) electrical engineering, (8) lighting, (9) water systems, (10) irrigation excluded, (11) solar excluded, (12) local contractor cost validation (bidding phase), (13) payment schedule with milestone names/pct/triggers, (14) deliverables per phase, (15) responsibilities matrix, (16) exclusions (14 specific items), (17) revision assumptions per phase, (18) timeline with phase sequence, (19) project-type clauses (6 clauses), (20) e-signature clause. Completeness 5, Accuracy 5: deliverables match production pipeline exactly. Clarity 5: client-ready document, phased structure clear. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: SOW produced after area program/cost basis and before DG-04. Decision_readiness 5: architect reviewer can approve or flag immediately.
celia_routing_notes: DG-04: decision=approve, route_to=Bruno. All 11 payload fields present.
